title: Outline Texture Pack
description: This Minecraft texture pack sharpens and outlines textures, giving your game a crisp, detailed, and polished look. Perfect with shaders.
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75ed60a0baac0f18602d3741ff66decb06ab04fd.png)

About This Pack

This texture pack sharpens and adds outlines to Minecraft textures, giving your game a more detailed and refined look while keeping the original style.

Recommendation: Use this pack with a shader to make your game look like the preview images. The shader used in the preview is Prizma Shader.
 

Note

This pack was originally made for the Bedrock Edition, and I have ported it to Java Edition. All preview images shown here were captured in the Bedrock version.
